# 016_秦楚之际月表

《史记》第 16 篇 · 表

*查看原文*: [/chapters/016_秦楚之际月表.html](/chapters/016_秦楚之际月表.html)

## 章节综述

秦既暴虐，楚人发难，项氏遂乱，汉乃扶义征伐；八年之间，天下三嬗，事繁变众，故详著秦楚之际月表第四。

**章节结构**

- **太史公读秦楚之际**：太史公读秦楚之际，曰：初作难，发於陈涉；
- **表**：| | 秦 | 楚 | 项 | 赵 |
  - 项羽分封后：| | 秦 | 楚 | 项 | 赵 |

## 主要实体

**人物**：[[项羽]] · [章邯](../entities/person.html#entity-章邯) · [田荣](../entities/person.html#entity-田荣) · [[刘邦]] · [[项梁]] · [张耳](../entities/person.html#entity-张耳) · [田假](../entities/person.html#entity-田假) · [[魏豹]] · [项籍](../entities/person.html#entity-项籍) · [陈涉](../entities/person.html#entity-陈涉) · [魏咎](../entities/person.html#entity-魏咎) · [陈余](../entities/person.html#entity-陈余)

**地点**：[荥阳](../entities/place.html#entity-荥阳) · [关中](../entities/place.html#entity-关中) · [东阿](../entities/place.html#entity-东阿) · [河南](../entities/place.html#entity-河南) · [临济](../entities/place.html#entity-临济) · [彭城](../entities/place.html#entity-彭城) · [定陶](../entities/place.html#entity-定陶) · [咸阳](../entities/place.html#entity-咸阳) · [废丘](../entities/place.html#entity-废丘) · [邯郸](../entities/place.html#entity-邯郸)

**邦国**：[汉](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-汉) · [秦](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-秦) · [楚](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-楚) · [赵](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-赵) · [齐](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-齐) · [燕](../entities/dynasty.html#entity-燕)
